selections.prompt_constraints: Prompt requires paper trays, folders/worksheets, board markers and a whiteboard eraser. Stage the board tools together on the teacher desk rather than relying on the generated trayless wall boards.
selections.style_notes: Teacher workspace should look organized and in-use; keep to a neat cluster on one side (5–7 items total).
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: paper trays, folders/worksheets, dry-erase markers, whiteboard eraser. Optional: gradebook/notebook, pen cup, stapler

selections.prompt_constraints: Prompt: "Add believable school-use details including... glue/scissors... folders/worksheets... pencil/marker holders... without clutter."
selections.style_notes: Central shared-supplies station; keep items in a tidy caddy/cluster, leave most tabletop clear.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: shared pencil/marker holder, glue, scissors, worksheets. Optional: small stack of colored paper, a couple of rulers

selections.prompt_constraints: Prompt: "Add believable school-use details including textbooks, notebooks... pencil/marker holders, erasers/rulers..."
selections.style_notes: Student surface: minimal (2–4 small items), placed toward the back corner to keep writing space clear.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: notebook, pencil. Optional: eraser, ruler

selections.prompt_constraints: Prompt: "Add believable school-use details including textbooks, notebooks, folders/worksheets..."
selections.style_notes: Keep a single closed book + 1–2 supplies; avoid clutter across all desks.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: textbook. Optional: notebook, pencil, folder

selections.prompt_constraints: Prompt: "Add believable school-use details including... water bottles..."
selections.style_notes: Bottle near a desk corner, leaving center workspace open.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: water bottle. Optional: notebook, pencil

selections.prompt_constraints: Prompt: "Add believable school-use details including textbooks... backpacks, storage bins... without clutter."
selections.style_notes: Use a few cubbies for bins and a few for books/backpacks; leave some cubbies empty for a tidy, realistic look.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: textbooks, labeled storage bins, backpacks. Optional: labeled folders/binders, spare notebooks
